goldSynthesisSection: IP-law domain models > CUAD 41-category contract / IP-licensing clause taxonomy
rationale: The 41-category CUAD clause taxonomy is an expert-curated controlled vocabulary with no contract/clause/license model anywhere in law-practice (gap); it extends the law-practice domain slice as a clause/IP-licensing value vocab plus an @beep/nlp-mcp span-grounded extraction label set.

goldSynthesisSection: IP-law domain models > Keyword -> statute-section mapping with confidence + LLM fallback
rationale: The deterministic-keyword-lookup (confidence 0.9) then LLM-fallback (confidence 0.5) shape is a clean classification-lookup template for a law-practice classification taxonomy; the two-tier confidence-on-candidates pattern itself already exists in the epistemic gate, so only the JSON taxonomy template is net-new.
cautions: Confidence-on-candidates + retrieval->candidate pattern already present in goals/epistemic-claim-lifecycle-gate (partial, not a fresh build)

goldSynthesisSection: IP-law domain models > Canonical court taxonomy + citation reporter-type enum
rationale: The citation reporter-type taxonomy (FEDERAL/STATE/SPECIALTY/NEUTRAL/WEST/LEXIS/JOURNAL with volume/reporter/page) is a pure logic-rule classification vocabulary; no reporter model exists in law-practice/domain (verified NONE FOUND), so it seeds the court-vocabulary-resolver wedge as an effect/Schema reporter vocab.

goldSynthesisSection: IP-law domain models > Canonical court taxonomy + citation reporter-type enum

goldSynthesisSection: IP-law domain models > Jurisdiction taxonomy + swappable per-matter jurisdiction packs
rationale: Config-only jurisdiction packs (profile.json + prompt.md appended per matter) supply the jurisdiction-vocab half of the court-vocabulary-resolver wedge plus a per-matter prompt-steering pattern; beep has no jurisdiction enum and no per-matter reasoning steering today.

goldSynthesisSection: IP-law domain models > Google Patents search filter taxonomy (alt prior-art provider)
rationale: The SerpApi Google Patents filter vocabulary (date-prefix syntax, status GRANT/APPLICATION, type PATENT/DESIGN, country/inventor/assignee) is reference material for an additional prior-art search driver alongside @beep/uspto; it belongs in the patent-driver-depth wedge whose seed already coordinates a net-new google-patents-bigquery driver feeding PriorArtReference.

goldSynthesisSection: IP-law domain models > Patent continuity / family-tree model
rationale: @beep/uspto UsptoContinuity is minimal (only child/parent applicationNumbers; verified in Uspto.models.ts) with no continuity TYPE, patent numbers, or filing dates, and PatentAsset carries no family fields; this ports the richer typed continuation/divisional/CIP/provisional record into the existing hand-rolled ODP driver.
cautions: Extend the hand-rolled @beep/uspto (already on ODP data.uspto.gov); never restart, never reintroduce PatentsView/PEDS
